---
name: Design question
about: A specific, answerable question the specs leave open
title: ""
labels: question
---

**The question**

One question, precisely. Threads with five questions get five answers nobody can find later — open five issues.

**What you've already read**

Which documents you checked. If the answer turns out to be in one of them, that's fine — it means the document buried it, which is also worth knowing.

**Why it needs an answer**

What decision or contribution is blocked on this.
